PROP-baseauction-pre-009.text: Only non-assetOut assets get new auctions; assetOut balance forwarded to receiver.
PROP-baseauction-pre-009.assertion: forall performUpkeep: asset==s_assetOut => no auctionStart set, balance forwarded

locations.note: lines 350-356: if asset==s_assetOut, safeTransfer to s_assetOutReceiver; else sets s_auctionStarts
